info.title: ServiceNow — Itential Services App
info.description:
ServiceNow scoped application REST API for the Itential Services integration, providing ServiceNow endpoints that interface with Itential Platform workflows and automation.

Authentication: HTTP Basic — ServiceNow username and password with access to the x_itent_services_itential scoped application.

Source: https://store.servicenow.com (Itential Services app)
info.x-itential-curated: Reviewed against the repo's common-CRUD-for-automation policy: all 1 upstream operations are already in scope, so the full spec is carried through as -latest. See the repo README for the operation breakdown and the full spec.
